text.title: Speech-to-Text Basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Five recurring failures in Whisper-based transcription pipelines.

antipattern.symptom: Ukrainian audio transcribes as transliterated Russian (or vice versa); downstream search fails.
antipattern.root-cause: language= parameter omitted; Whisper auto-detect chose the wrong language.
antipattern.fix: Always pass language= explicitly from content metadata (rule r1).

antipattern.symptom: Pipeline rejects FLAC / OGG sources at API time, late in the flow.
antipattern.root-cause: Format guard not at the ingest edge; unsupported formats accepted upstream.
antipattern.fix: Reject unsupported formats at ingest with a clear error (rule r3).

antipattern.symptom: Files >25 MB silently fail; whole episode goes untranscribed.
antipattern.root-cause: No pre-split step; pipeline assumes API will handle large files.
antipattern.fix: Use pydub or ffmpeg to split on silence boundaries before API call (rule r4).

antipattern.symptom: Engineers build "streaming" with overlapping 30s windows; latency 5s, accuracy 60%.
antipattern.root-cause: Whisper used for sub-300ms streaming; tries to stitch end-of-segment results.
antipattern.fix: Use Deepgram / AssemblyAI / Azure Realtime for actual streaming (rule r6).

antipattern.symptom: API bill explodes at high volume; finops escalates.
antipattern.root-cause: Production runs >10k hours/month on the API instead of local faster-whisper.
antipattern.fix: At >10k hr/month switch to faster-whisper on GPU; amortise hardware (rule r5).
